flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Anne Arundel Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Anne Arundel Community College fell 18% between 2017 and 2020 ($10.0k → $8.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Anne Arundel Community College fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.6k → $11.5k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Anne Arundel Community College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (61.4% → 69.1%).
